title: aquilegia formosa var. chrysantha
intro: Aquilegia formosa var. chrysantha, also known as golden columbine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of golden columbine include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Golden columbine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
